close_reason: Simplified commit proxy API to require epoch parameter
description:
Update client to include expected epoch when sending transactions to commit proxy:

1. Client learns epoch during connection/handshake
2. Client includes epoch in commit requests
3. Commit proxy validates epoch matches current generation
4. Reject transactions from stale/future epoch clients

This is the outermost layer of epoch validation - prevents clients from wrong generation from even reaching the sequencer.

Depends on: bedrock-noim (commit proxy must handle epoch first)
title: Client sends expected epoch with commit proxy requests
